title: Cotham Gardens Primary School (Bristol): warning notice
body: "Notice relating to: Cotham Gardens Primary School  URN: 138708  Notice issued to: Cotham Gardens Primary School Ltd  Reason for issue: ‘special measures’ Ofsted judgement  DfE regional director: Lucy Livings  DfE regional director office: South West  Local authority: Bristol City Council "
